ddls:
CREATE TABLE "receptors" (
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptor */,
  "receptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the receptor */,
  "receptor_type" TEXT /* Type of the receptor (e.g., 5HT1B, 5HT2B) */,
  "receptor_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the receptor */,
  "receptor_structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the receptor (e.g., PDB ID) */,
  "receptor_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the receptor */,
  "receptor_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the receptor */,
  "receptor_biological_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the receptor */,
  "receptor_species" TEXT /* Species from which the receptor is derived */,
  "receptor_cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line in which the receptor is expressed */,
  "receptor_modified" INTEGER /* Whether the receptor is modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receptors_receptor_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptor_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receptors_receptor_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptor_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsets" (
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subset */,
  "subset_name" TEXT /* Name of the subset */,
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receptor that the subset belongs to */,
  "subset_description" TEXT /* Description of the subset */,
  "subset_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the subset */,
  "subset_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the subset */,
  "subset_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the subset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsets_subset_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsets_receptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptor_id") REFERENCES receptors ("receptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsets_subset_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., physicochemical, pharmacophoric) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the feature */,
  "feature_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_features_feature_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_features_feature_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_types" (
  "score_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score type */,
  "score_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the score type (e.g., dE, dU) */,
  "score_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the score type */,
  "score_type_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the score type */,
  "score_type_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the score type */,
  "score_type_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the score type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_types_score_type_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_type_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_types_score_type_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_type_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receptor that the score belongs to */,
  "subset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subset that the score belongs to */,
  "score_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score type that the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was calculated */,
  "score_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score */,
  "score_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the score */,
  "score_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the score */,
  "score_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_score_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_score_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_type_id") REFERENCES score_types ("score_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_receptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptor_id") REFERENCES receptors ("receptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_subset_id FOREIGN KEY ("subset_id") REFERENCES subsets ("subset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_score_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichments" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment value */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score that the enrichment value belongs to */,
  "enrichment_value" REAL /* Value of the enrichment */,
  "enrichment_date" TEXT /* Date the enrichment was calculated */,
  "enrichment_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the enrichment */,
  "enrichment_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the enrichment */,
  "enrichment_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the enrichment */,
  "enrichment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the enrichment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichments_enrichment_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichments_enrichment_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichments_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_values" (
  "feature_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that the feature value belongs to */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score that the feature value belongs to */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_value_date" TEXT /* Date the feature value was calculated */,
  "feature_value_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the feature value */,
  "feature_value_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the feature value */,
  "feature_value_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the feature value */,
  "feature_value_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the feature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_value_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_value_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES molecular_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_value_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_value_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "quality_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score that the quality metric belongs to */,
  "quality_metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., all_same, hyd_prop) */,
  "quality_metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric_date" TEXT /* Date the quality metric was calculated */,
  "quality_metric_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method of the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_quality_metric_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_metric_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_quality_metric_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_metric_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_url" TEXT /* URL of the data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
